fields.label: Warranty Issuer Company
fields.description: The company that issues warranty/VAS plans to customers.

fields.label: Service Provider Company
fields.description: The company that performs repairs and services.

fields.label: Anniversary Plan Threshold (Months)
fields.description: Plans with duration >= this value are classified as 'anniversary_warranty'. Plans below this are classified as 'vas_plan'. Set to 0 to disable auto-classification (use plan-level override instead).

fields.label: Post-Repair Warranty (Months)
fields.description: Months of warranty issued after a successful repair (Service Warranty Register). Applies to claims closed under anniversary/VAS/paid plans.

fields.label: Paid Repair Defaults
fields.description: Default fee calculation for claims with no warranty coverage (paid_repair). These apply when the plan has no fee rules configured.

fields.label: Paid Repair Fee %
fields.description: Default processing fee as percentage of estimated repair cost for paid repairs.

fields.label: Paid Repair Fee Minimum
fields.description: Minimum processing fee for paid repairs (floor). Applied when percentage yields a lower amount.

fields.label: Paid Repair Fee Maximum
fields.description: Maximum processing fee cap for paid repairs. 0 = no cap.

fields.label: Fee Waiver Approval Roles
fields.default:
Sales Manager
CH Warranty Manager
System Manager
fields.description: Roles that can directly approve processing fee waivers (one per line). Users without these roles must submit an exception request.

fields.label: Auto-Approve Threshold
fields.description: Claims with GoGizmo share <= this amount are auto-approved without manager review. 0 = always require approval per plan rules.
